availableVouchers.name: 20 PLN for purchase in Škoda E-Shop
availableVouchers.description: Unlock Savings with MyŠkoda Club! Redeem your points for a 20 PLN discount voucher, valid on any purchase of 40 PLN or more in the Škoda E-Shop. Use exclusive savings on your favourite products at Škoda E-Shop: https://eshop.skoda-auto.com/pl_PL/.
availableVouchers.detailedDescription: **The voucher is valid for a minimum of 30 days.** Shop now and save!
